name: expression-evaluator
title: Expression Evaluator
description: A minimal example demonstrating xript's tier 1 adoption: safe expression evaluation. Exposes basic math and string operations in a sandboxed environment.

abs.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

round.description: Rounds a number to the nearest integer.

floor.description: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer.

ceil.description: Rounds a number up to the nearest integer.

min.description: Returns the smaller of two numbers.

max.description: Returns the larger of two numbers.

clamp.description: Clamps a value between a minimum and maximum.

len.description: Returns the length of a string.
